arts.ttl: Chelsea and Tottenham can save millions on perfect solution to Arsenal transfer problem
arts.sum: However, the striker has not communicated his final decision to the club - although he has previously outlined his admiration for the Premier League and that he'd like play in that competition at some stage in his career. Chelsea and Tottenham are reportedly considering a move for in-demand Canada striker Jonathan David, but the soon-to-be free agent might actually be a better proposition for Arsenal instead.

arts.ttl: Leaving Man Utd for Chelsea was weird - but this team can achieve big things
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Jadon Sancho believes the squad can achieve'something big' after their superb start to the campaign. In three of Chelsea's last five outings, Sancho has scored two goals and provided an assist helping the Blues move to within two points of Premier League leaders Liverpool and take a comfortable lead at the UEFA Conference League summit.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca private feelings on two Chelsea stars revealed as passionate speech speaks volumes
arts.sum: More players have been called into training across the Cobham divide, as Maresca rests and rotates his group for the Conference League group stage, but it is George and Acheampong who have made the journey into the main squad first. After announcing that both Cobham academy prospects, Tyrique George and Josh Acheampong, had been elevated into the senior squad - for good - the head coach was keen to keep standards high.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Shamrock Rovers - Europa Conference League: Live score, team news and updates as Enzo Maresca's side aim to maintain perfect start in Europe
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Chelsea host Shamrock Rovers in the Europa Conference League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea are ahead of schedule - Madueke
arts.sum: Noni Madueke tells BBC Sport's Kelly Somers about life at Chelsea, playing for Enzo Maresca and whether the Blues are in the Premier League title race.

arts.ttl: Why Marcus Rashford and Jadon Sancho could learn a thing or two from Harry Maguire and his old-school attitude, writes IAN LADYMAN
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: Once an £80m defender also courted by Manchester City at the time United bought him from Leicester, Maguire lost his form, his confidence and the Old Trafford captaincy.

arts.ttl: Mykhailo Mudryk's Chelsea career summed up in two words amid failed drug test
arts.sum: As Mykhailo Mudryk took to the Stamford Bridge pitch at half-time of Chelsea's victory against Crystal Palace in January 2023, there was an air of excitement, buoyancy and optimism among supporters. However, despite his really promising debut, it was always going to take some time for Mudryk to settle in at Stamford Bridge.
